best_window: Early morning to late morning before wind builds
report_text: Visibility is pretty limited at about 5-9 ft. Primary swell is around 1.9 ft @ 12s from SSW, so expect a little texture and surge around exposed reef. Wind tops out near 8 mph, enough to add some afternoon bump but not totally wreck the day. Probably a quick-check day unless the cam looks cleaner than expected. Stay safe out there divers.
